LinkedIn Marketing API Program
The LinkedIn Marketing Platform helps businesses grow by building technology to reach, engage, and convert professional audiences at scale. The platform offers APIs to create LinkedIn marketing campaigns, to report campaign performance, to manage leads, and to grow a company Page.

composio_raw.name: LinkedIn
composio_raw.description: LinkedIn is a professional networking platform enabling job seekers, companies, and thought leaders to connect, share content, and discover business opportunities

llm_raw.description: LinkedIn's marketing and advertising platform enables businesses to manage ad campaigns, target professional audiences, track conversions, and sync lead data.
llm_raw.notes: While the API is publicly documented, access often requires application review and approval by LinkedIn for production use cases.
